title: 🧾 Category Theory (Compositional Logic)
name: Category Theory (Compositional Logic)
what_it_is: A high-level math that studies relationships between structures instead of their contents—“math of math.” Useful for modeling mythic relationships, transformation logic, or abstract identity flow.
how_to_use: her form encodes category logic—each gesture transforms structure, not substance
a symbolic engine of morphisms pulses behind her eyes—equivalence and metaphor as shape
animation_behavior: Gestures link concepts, shape transforms ripple through space, visual metaphor maps ---
